_methodologyNote: alpha and fixedFeeRate are measured from a live ticker spread snapshot and the pre-registered fee tier (config/market.json). sigmaEntry/sigmaExit/adv are measured from the ingested OHLCV series (median |log return| and average daily base-asset volume). beta and kappaImpact are NOT empirically fittable (no real fill/slippage data exists for this venue) and are derived via a documented spread-relative heuristic: beta = alpha / median(sigma_t); kappaImpact = alpha / sqrt(referenceImpactRatio), with quantity = adv * referenceImpactRatio kept self-consistent with that same reference point. gammaPanic has no real-data anchor and is carried over unchanged as an explicitly-flagged assumption. Re-run this script (apps/worker/scripts/calibrate-friction.ts) to refresh — it is idempotent and safe to re-run.
